{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sword Sage's Disciple
| aliases = Sword Sage's disciple
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] is a practitioner of the [[Path of the Endless Sword]] and serves as the [[disciple]] to the [[Sword Sage]]. Though previously underestimated by some elders of the [[Heaven's Glory]] school, she has demonstrated extraordinary combat capabilities. She is capable of defeating numerous [[Iron]]-level combatants from her school, often leaving them wounded or deceased. Her power level is associated with the [[Gold]] expertise of her master, and she has been observed traveling toward a tomb, potentially in pursuit of the [[Sword Sage]]'s remains. She possesses various secret techniques and weaponry, though she has recently faced situations where her options were limited.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] is known as the [[Sword Sage's Disciple]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is searching for the [[Sword Sage's Disciple{{!}}Sword Sage's disciple]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
